name: Primary Decomposition
description: Primary ideal, associated primes. Lasker–Noether: I=∩Qᵢ. Uniqueness of isolated components.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Primary ideal\nxy∈Q⇒x∈Q or yⁿ∈Q"]
    D2["Def: Associated prime\nP=√(0:M)"]
    D3["Def: Isolated comp\nminimal ass"]
    D4["Def: Radical\n√I = {x: xⁿ∈I}"]
    T1["Thm: Lasker–Noether\nI=Q₁∩...∩Qₙ"]
    T2["Thm: Ass(M) finite"]
    T3["Thm: Uniqueness\nisolated comp unique"]
    T4["Thm: √primary = prime"]
    T5["Thm: First uniqueness\nradicals"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D3 --> T3
    D4 --> T4
    T1 --> T3
    T1 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
